name: issue-resolver
description: Automated issue-resolution system: GitHub Actions -> Cloudflare Worker -> Sandbox running Claude Code -> Pull Request

WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Shared HMAC secret. Must match the `WEBHOOK_SECRET` repo secret used by the GitHub Action. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

TOKEN_ENC_KEY.description: AES-256-GCM key (32 bytes) used to encrypt GitHub tokens at rest. Generate one with `openssl rand -hex 32`.

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Your [Anthropic API key](https://console.anthropic.com/) that powers Claude Code.

GITHUB_CLIENT_ID.description: GitHub OAuth App client id. Leave blank now; set it after you register your OAuth App (its callback needs the deployed URL).

GITHUB_CLIENT_SECRET.description: GitHub OAuth App client secret. Set it after registering your OAuth App.

PUBLIC_URL.description: Your deployed Worker URL, e.g. `https://issue-resolver.<subdomain>.workers.dev`. Update after the first deploy so OAuth callbacks resolve.
